enableFileIndexSearch.name: Enable File Index Search
enableFileIndexSearch.description[zh_CN]: 用于恢复默认设置时判断是否启用文件索引
enableFileIndexSearch.description: Used for restore defaults to determine whether to enable file index

enableFullTextSearch.name: Enable Full-Text Search
enableFullTextSearch.description[zh_CN]: 用于判断是否开启全文搜索
enableFullTextSearch.description: Used to determine whether to enable full-text search

enableOcrTextSearch.name: Enable OCR Text Search
enableOcrTextSearch.name[zh_CN]: 开启 OCR 文本搜索
enableOcrTextSearch.description[zh_CN]: 用于判断是否开启 OCR 文本搜索
enableOcrTextSearch.description: Used to determine whether to enable OCR text search

enableSemanticSearch.name: Enable Semantic Search
enableSemanticSearch.description[zh_CN]: 开启智能搜索后支持在文件管理器中使用自然语言搜索文件，例如"昨天编辑过的PPT文档"
enableSemanticSearch.description: Enable smart search to search files using natural language in the file manager, e.g. "PPT documents edited yesterday"

displaySearchHistory.name: Display search history
displaySearchHistory.description[zh_CN]: 用于判断是否显示搜索记录
displaySearchHistory.description: Used to determine whether to enable display search history

searchAuthHintDone.name: Search Authorization Hint Done
searchAuthHintDone.description[zh_CN]: 用于判断是否已展示或处理过搜索授权体验提示
searchAuthHintDone.description: Used to determine whether the search authorization experience hint has already been handled
